description.para: The Control register (CR) controls the major functions of the device.
It is used to set the function to be implemented by the RSA device in the next iteration.
The Status Register(SR) indicates the current state of RSA device.

briefdescription.para: This function writes all the RSA data used for decryption (Modulus, Exponent) at the corresponding offsets in RSA RAM.
This function reads back the resulting data from RSA RAM.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to location where the decrypted data will be written

listitem.para: Total bits to be read 4096 Each iteration of this loop reads 32 * 6 = 192 bits Therefore, for 4096, total iterations required = 4096/192 = 21.33 = 22

briefdescription.para: This function clears whole RSA memory space.

detaileddescription.para: This function clears stored exponent, modulus and exponentiation key components along with digest.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS On Zeroization Success XSECURE_RSA_ZEROIZE_ERROR On Zeroization Failure.

listitem.para: Each iteration of this loop writes Zero in to one of the six RSA Write Buffers

briefdescription.para: This function verifies the Zeroization of RSA memory space.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS On Success XSECURE_RSA_ZEROIZE_ERROR On Zeroize Verify Failure

briefdescription.para: This function writes data to RSA RAM at a given offset.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the data to be written to RSA RAM
Offset for the data to be written in RSA RAM

listitem.para: Total bits to be written 4096 (RSA Key size) Each iteration of this loop writes 32 * 6 = 192 bits Therefore, for 4096, total iteration required = 4096/192 = 21.33 = 22
Exponent size is only 4 bytes and rest of the data needs to be 0
The RSA data in Image is in Big Endian. So reverse it before putting in RSA memory, because RSA h/w expects it in Little endian.

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the MINV value and put it into RSA core registers.

simplesect.para: MINV is the 32-bit value of -M mod 2**32, where M is LSB 32 bits of the original modulus.

listitem.para: Put the value in MINV registers

briefdescription.para: This function stores the base address of RSA core registers.

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_Rsa *InstancePtr, u8 *Input, u8 *Result, u8 EncDecFlag, u32 Size)
memberdef.name: XSecure_RsaOperation

briefdescription.para: This function handles the all RSA operations with provided inputs.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the buffer which contains the input data to be decrypted.
Pointer to the buffer where resultant decrypted data to be stored.

listitem.para: Put Modulus, exponent, Mod extension in RSA RAM
Zeroize and Verify RSA memory space

briefdescription.para: This function returns PKCS padding as per the silicon version.

simplesect.para: XSecure_Silicon2_TPadSha3 if Silicon version is not 1.0 XSecure_Silicon1_TPadSha3 if Silicon version is 1.0

listitem.para: If Silicon version is not 1.0 then use the latest NIST approved SHA-3 id for padding

briefdescription.para: for RSA private decryption data should be lesser than modulus
No of writes or reads to RSA RAM Buffers.
